Three modes, one app

Every draw, covered.

Switch between three professional draw modes — each purpose-built for its use case.

🎁
Tombola

Draw winners from a list of participants and prizes. Perfect for fundraising nights, club events, and charity tombolas with multiple prize tiers.

#
Bingo

Draw numbers with a virtual tombola drum. Auto-draw mode keeps the game flowing automatically — ideal for school fairs and bingo nights.

🎟️
Lotjes

Configure colour-coded lottery tickets with custom number ranges. A full ticket management system for traditional Flemish-style lotjes evenings.

Features

Everything you need.

No learning curve. Open the app, configure your draw, and go.

📋
Bulk import

Import participant lists and prizes in bulk. No manual entry for large groups — paste or import and you're ready.

🎨
Full personalisation

Configure colours, number ranges, prize categories, and more. Every draw can be set up exactly how you need it.

▶️
Auto-draw mode

Let the app draw automatically at your own pace. Hands-free mode keeps the energy up at your event without manual intervention.

📱
Works offline

No internet required during your event. DrawMaster runs entirely on your iPhone — no connectivity issues.

🔒
Fair & transparent

True randomisation every time. Everyone can see a fair, unbiased draw — no surprises, no favourites.

📊
Live statistics

Track drawn numbers, remaining entries, and totals in real time. Stay on top of your draw at every moment.

Lotjes

Colour-coded tickets, fully configured.

DrawMaster's Lotjes mode lets you define colour ranges, ticket counts, and prize assignments — the most complete digital lotjes solution available.

  • Configure multiple colour ranges (red #1–50, blue #51–100, …)
  • Track drawn, remaining, and total tickets in real time
  • Free version includes up to 25 tickets to try it out
  • Upgrade for unlimited tickets and full configuration
